'''Anic''' was a terrestrial celestial body<ref name="AIR" /> located in the [[Anic system/Legends|Anic system]], a part of the [[Xan sector/Legends|Xan sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point not long before<ref name="AIR" /> a point in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> the [[Mining/Legends|mine]] survival instructor and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] member [[Larq Thur]] [[Death/Legends|perished]] as part of the [[Lijarak Mines Incident]] that took place on Anic.<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Anic was mentioned in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="AIR" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' subsequently placed the Anic [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body itself, in grid square Q-15.<ref name="TEA" />
